message:
feat(authfile): add smart auto-backup before profile switch (caam-zti)

Add automatic backup functionality to prevent data loss during profile switches:

1. BackupCurrent(fileSet) - Creates timestamped backup (_backup_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS)
2. RotateAutoBackups(tool, maxBackups) - Deletes oldest backups when over limit

Integrates with activate command based on safety.auto_backup_before_switch config:
- "always": Backup before every switch (if changing profiles)
- "smart": Backup only if current state doesn't match any vault profile (default)
- "never": Skip automatic backups

The --backup-current flag overrides config to force "always" mode.

Also includes formatting cleanup in config files.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
